name: Learning Management System
summary: An internal enterprise LMS built for PT. Komatsu Remanufacturing Asia that centralizes employee training workflows — from planning, approvals, scheduling, to certification tracking and reporting dashboards.
highlights: Role-based access control with multi-level approval workflows
Interactive scheduling system with calendar integration
Automated certification tracking and expiry notifications
Real-time reporting dashboards with exportable data

name: TiketKu — Flight Booking App
summary: A full-featured flight booking application developed during Binar Academy's Kampus Merdeka program. Led the frontend team to deliver end-to-end booking flows, seat selection, payment processing, and e-ticket generation.
highlights: Multi-passenger booking flow with dynamic seat selection
Payment gateway integration with transaction history
E-ticket generation with QR code validation
State management architecture using Redux Toolkit

name: Academic Information System API
summary: A comprehensive RESTful API system for Institut Teknologi Kalimantan's internal academic modules — handling student data, course management, grading systems, and inter-service communication.
highlights: RESTful API architecture with versioned endpoints
Eloquent ORM with optimized query performance
